---
name: New Adapter Request
about: Request support for a new CCTV system or NVR
title: "[Adapter] "
labels: adapter, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## CCTV System
Name and version of the system you want supported.

## Why cctvQL needs this
How many users does this system have? Is it open source?

## API / Integration Details
- API documentation: (link if public)
- Authentication: API key / Basic auth / Token / Other
- REST API available: Yes / No
- MQTT / WebSocket events: Yes / No
- ONVIF compliant: Yes / No / Unknown

## Are you willing to help implement it?
- [ ] Yes, I can write the adapter
- [ ] Yes, I can test it but need help with code
- [ ] No, just requesting
